nasb.text: Then I perceived that surely God had not sent him, but he uttered his prophecy against me because Tobiah and Sanballat had hired him.

esv.text: And I understood and saw that God had not sent him, but he had pronounced the prophecy against me because Tobiah and Sanballat had hired him.

cnv.text: 我看出　神並沒有差派他，是他自己宣講這話攻擊我，因為多比雅和參巴拉收買了他。

ccb.text: 我察觉上帝并没有差派他，他是被多比雅和参巴拉收买才说预言攻击我的。
